name: Sandor Clegane
description:
While exploring the Red Keep, you suddenly encounter none other than the Hound.

The disfigured, half-burned face of Sandor Clegane is staring right at you, sneering horribly. Will you try to tame one of the most dangerous fighters in all the Seven Kingdoms?

Or will you submit to the dark intrigue that rules King's Landing?

(Originally set during the rule of Robert Baratheon)
creator: comebackjessica
